word: H1518 - גִּיחַ - gîyach - ghee'-akh - Break forth

sections.paragraph:
Original: גּח גּיח

Transliteration: gı̂yach gôach

Phonetic: ghee'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. to burst forth
    1. (Qal)
      1. to burst forth
      2. to draw forth
      3. to bring forth
    2. (Hiphil) to break forth

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 345

Part(s) of speech: Verb
